nodes.label: AI as collaboration partner
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI mainly as a collaboration partner

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness for data integrity
nodes.grounding_span: past experiences of writing detailed prompts and uploading data in very specific structure only to get it back where those instructions were not fully fulfilled or data was missing or changed

nodes.label: AI as learning catalyst
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch that hinders skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I see AI as an catalyst to what humans, including me, are capable of

nodes.label: AI solution simplicity vs. over-engineering
nodes.grounding_span: vibe coding has also lead to some of my biggest frustration where the solutions AI offers are overly elaborate

nodes.label: Managing multiple AI tools
nodes.grounding_span: I often struggle with competing AIs

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: saving my coworkers 10-14 hours every week

nodes.label: Skill development and learning
nodes.grounding_span: had it teach me groovy along the way

nodes.label: Control and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle tasks that have specific data inputs and outputs

nodes.label: Seamless integration and reduced overhead
nodes.grounding_span: Time saved later when AI assists with generation but in the beginning sometimes all of that prevents me from engaging with AI

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as learning partner
nodes.grounding_span: I recently was able to use AI to help me write a groovy script to accomplish a task that was costing folks in my department many hours a week

nodes.label: Frustration with AI over-engineering
nodes.grounding_span: vibe coding has also lead to some of my biggest frustration where the solutions AI offers are overly elaborate

nodes.label: Trust issues limiting delegation
nodes.grounding_span: I rarely assign it tasks due to trust issues

nodes.label: Optimism about future seamless AI
nodes.grounding_span: Hopefully continued experiences will allow a more trustful relationship where I can 'bring it with me'

nodes.label: Iterative collaborative refinement — guides AI step-by-step
nodes.grounding_span: I will ask it to tell me what I am missing, explain why something may or may not be a good idea, flesh out something I have already established a framework for

nodes.label: Comparative tool orchestration — evaluates multiple AI personalities
nodes.grounding_span: I have to learn the personalities, strengths, and weaknesses of each so I know who to go to
